short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, , Scotland end with 90. They have added 39 after the resumption. Was a tossed up delivery,
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, , Scotland end with 90. They have added 39 after the resumption. Was a tossed up delivery, Michael Jones sat down and slog swept it wide of deep mid for a four. Fetched it and placed it well. Excellent final over from Rashid despite that four

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, one more. Wider, Munsey slams the reverse down the ground for a single. That was only 66 c
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, one more. Wider, Munsey slams the reverse down the ground for a single. That was only 66 clicks. Very slow indeed from Rashid

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, sits down and slams it down to long-on for a single. Was very slow again from Adil
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, sits down and slams it down to long-on for a single. Was very slow again from Adil Rashid

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, hangs back and pulls the ball down to deep square for a single
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, hangs back and pulls the ball down to deep square for a single

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, no run, dot ball. Goes for the reverse and misses. Was a leggie, very slow, keeps low and Munsey
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, no run, dot ball. Goes for the reverse and misses. Was a leggie, very slow, keeps low and Munsey misses the reverse sweep. The keeper fumbled a little

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, slams it down to long-off for a single
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, slams it down to long-off for a single

short_text: Jordan to Munsey, 2 runs, Jones has made it. 10 off the over. That was flogged down to long-on and Michael Jones should
full_text: Jordan to Munsey, 2 runs, Jones has made it. 10 off the over. That was flogged down to long-on and Michael Jones should have easily made it but the bat got stuck in the ground as he was about to touch down. But it ends well for him

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, leg byes, 1 run, only a single. Follows the batter with a length delivery angled in. Michael Jo
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, leg byes, 1 run, only a single. Follows the batter with a length delivery angled in. Michael Jones looked to slog it across the line and missed it. The ball went off the pads into the off-side and they stole a leg bye. Very important final ball coming up

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, crucial dot ball. Length delivery, hard length, punched back to the bowler. He has to s
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, crucial dot ball. Length delivery, hard length, punched back to the bowler. He has to slog at these. Has been a decent over so far from Jordan

short_text: Jordan to Munsey, 1 run, 7 off the over so far. Need more boundaries. Fuller one, failed to get under it and was mistime
full_text: Jordan to Munsey, 1 run, 7 off the over so far. Need more boundaries. Fuller one, failed to get under it and was mistimed down to deep mid for a single

short_text: Jordan to Munsey, , and six more. He is hitting them well. Was a length delivery on the pads, Munsey managed to whip it
full_text: Jordan to Munsey, , and six more. He is hitting them well. Was a length delivery on the pads, Munsey managed to whip it off the pads and behind square for a sixer. Timed it well after a little walk across the sticks

short_text: Jordan to Munsey, no run, Jordan went for 15 in his over. Chance for some redemption. Starts with a fuller length delive
full_text: Jordan to Munsey, no run, Jordan went for 15 in his over. Chance for some redemption. Starts with a fuller length delivery angled across, Munsey looked to slog and missed the line of the delivery. Failed to get under it

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, gets that on to the on-side and they get a single. Scotland have their openers to thank. T
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, 1 run, gets that on to the on-side and they get a single. Scotland have their openers to thank. They have been pretty good on a icket which isn't flat for sure

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, , whoa! That's massive. That's huge. Was a tossed up delivery, Munsey went for the reverse and ha
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, , whoa! That's massive. That's huge. Was a tossed up delivery, Munsey went for the reverse and hammers it over cover. Scotland will take these runs with open arms

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, , flatter one, hit me ball and Munsey goes for the reverse and connects well. The man at deep cov
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, , flatter one, hit me ball and Munsey goes for the reverse and connects well. The man at deep cover had no chance

short_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, no run, was a tossed up delivery, Munsey looks to slog sweep and misses. The ball went off the pa
full_text: Adil Rashid to Munsey, no run, was a tossed up delivery, Munsey looks to slog sweep and misses. The ball went off the pads and into the gloves. Buttler and Adil Rashid just went up for a review. Review lost

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, from the front of the hand, flatter, wider, outside off, Michael Jones slaps it dow
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, 1 run, from the front of the hand, flatter, wider, outside off, Michael Jones slaps it down into the off-side for a single. 16 legal balls to go

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, , fuller length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones gets under it and swings the ball awa
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael Jones, , fuller length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones gets under it and swings the ball away over long-off. That was in the zone and Michael Jones put it away with elan. Scotland need more of these

short_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, only one. Ends the over. Flatter one, outside off, slapped down to deep cover. Excell
full_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, only one. Ends the over. Flatter one, outside off, slapped down to deep cover. Excellent from Ali. Only three singles after the restart. He bowled four balls and all of them were on the mark

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, looks to slog sweep, gets a top-edge and the ball lands short of the man at short third. The
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, looks to slog sweep, gets a top-edge and the ball lands short of the man at short third. They get a single. England would be pleased

short_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, gets it through the off-side for a single
full_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, gets it through the off-side for a single

short_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, no run, tossed up delivery, pushed back to the bowler. Scotland can't afford dots from here
full_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, no run, tossed up delivery, pushed back to the bowler. Scotland can't afford dots from here

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, tossed up delivery, Munsey stabs it down to cover for a single
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, tossed up delivery, Munsey stabs it down to cover for a single

short_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, little rain drops. Michael Jones went back and punched it down to deep cover. The gro
full_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, little rain drops. Michael Jones went back and punched it down to deep cover. The groundsmen have the covers in their hands

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, 1 run, gets it down to deep cover for a single. Was fuller, wider, Michael Jones mistimes it an
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, 1 run, gets it down to deep cover for a single. Was fuller, wider, Michael Jones mistimes it and gets a single to end the powerplay period

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, another short of length delivery. Michael Jones ain't complaining. Sat back and slapped
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, another short of length delivery. Michael Jones ain't complaining. Sat back and slapped it only for Jacks at point to stop it

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , disastrous over for England and Jordan so far. Michael Jones gets hold of the slower delivery
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , disastrous over for England and Jordan so far. Michael Jones gets hold of the slower delivery and slams the pull wide of deep mid for a four. He climbed on top of that despite some low bounce on it

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , slapped through the off-side for a four. Was wide outside off and Michael Jones got hold of t
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , slapped through the off-side for a four. Was wide outside off and Michael Jones got hold of the delivery and muscled it wide of the man at cover for a four

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , whacked! Was a short ball, got on top of it and pulled it big. That has landed on the rood wh
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, , whacked! Was a short ball, got on top of it and pulled it big. That has landed on the rood where the solar panels were lying. That ball seems to be gone, outta here...

short_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, length delivery, angled in, Michael Jones defends it off the full face of the bat
full_text: Jordan to Michael Jones, no run, length delivery, angled in, Michael Jones defends it off the full face of the bat

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, and dot to end. The batter looks to defend and gets it off the highish end. The ball lobs b
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, and dot to end. The batter looks to defend and gets it off the highish end. The ball lobs back to the bowler on a few bounces. Wood is still miffed at the no-ball

short_text: Mark Wood to Michael Jones, 1 run, push drives it wide of mid-off for a single. Wood tumbles for the second time today.
full_text: Mark Wood to Michael Jones, 1 run, push drives it wide of mid-off for a single. Wood tumbles for the second time today. He did so in the first over

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, 1 run, stays back and stabs it down into the off-side for a single
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, 1 run, stays back and stabs it down into the off-side for a single

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, slower one, free-hit ball but Munsey was too early into the shot. Misses the slog as the ba
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, slower one, free-hit ball but Munsey was too early into the shot. Misses the slog as the ball almost rolled down to the keeper

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , uh oh! This is poor from England. No-ball from Wood and Munsey survives. Was a length delivery, M
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , uh oh! This is poor from England. No-ball from Wood and Munsey survives. Was a length delivery, Munsey looked to slog it across the line and got a top-edge. The keeper called for it and took it easily. But he had over-stepped

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, 2 runs, little bit of fumble again. Second time England have been sloppy. Munsey stood tall and pun
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, 2 runs, little bit of fumble again. Second time England have been sloppy. Munsey stood tall and punched it. Ali lets it through and the get a brace

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, fuller one, right up there, Munsey looks to clip and misses. That was hurled at 151.6 kph.
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, fuller one, right up there, Munsey looks to clip and misses. That was hurled at 151.6 kph. Munsey missed the clip and there was an appeal but was turned down

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , angled across, but too high and Munsey left it alone for it to be wided
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , angled across, but too high and Munsey left it alone for it to be wided

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, short ball, hits the batter on his shoulder as it was released at 141.1 clicks. T
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, short ball, hits the batter on his shoulder as it was released at 141.1 clicks. The batter was late on it and missed the pull

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, slower one, outside off, Michael Jones slaps it but finds the man at cover point.
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, slower one, outside off, Michael Jones slaps it but finds the man at cover point. That was doled up at 76 miles per hour by Jofra Archer as he disguised the slower ball well

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, back of a length delivery, cuts back in, swung in a little at close to 90 miles p
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, back of a length delivery, cuts back in, swung in a little at close to 90 miles per hour. Michael Jones wanted to punch it on the up and was beaten on the inside edge

short_text: Jofra Archer to Munsey, 1 run, pitched up delivery on the pads, whipped down to deep square for a single
full_text: Jofra Archer to Munsey, 1 run, pitched up delivery on the pads, whipped down to deep square for a single

short_text: Jofra Archer to Munsey, no run, back of a length delivery, slight anngle aross at 91 mph. Munsey gets the bat down and s
full_text: Jofra Archer to Munsey, no run, back of a length delivery, slight anngle aross at 91 mph. Munsey gets the bat down and stabs it back to the bowler

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 1 run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones dabs the ball down to third
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 1 run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones dabs the ball down to third man for a single. He waited on it and played it late

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, no run, Munsey looking good. But reliant on sweep. Was slowed up, outside off, Munsey looked to swe
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, no run, Munsey looking good. But reliant on sweep. Was slowed up, outside off, Munsey looked to sweep and cue-ended it down into the off-side as he was too early into the shot

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, , four more. Excellent start for Scotland. Goes for the staple sweep shot and manages to hit it beh
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, , four more. Excellent start for Scotland. Goes for the staple sweep shot and manages to hit it behind square for a four. That was hit hard and into the gap

short_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, goes back and nudges it wide of mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Moeen Ali to Michael Jones, 1 run, goes back and nudges it wide of mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, turn, bounce, takes the edge and there is no slip. The ball goes fine for a single as the ma
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, 1 run, turn, bounce, takes the edge and there is no slip. The ball goes fine for a single as the man at short third man cuts it off

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, , got across his sticks, sat down and played the paddle sweep to get it wide of short fine for a fo
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, , got across his sticks, sat down and played the paddle sweep to get it wide of short fine for a four

short_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, no run, tossed up delivery, driven to the man at cover
full_text: Moeen Ali to Munsey, no run, tossed up delivery, driven to the man at cover

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, short ball, looks to pull and gets a top-edge. The ball lands over the keeper. Th
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, short ball, looks to pull and gets a top-edge. The ball lands over the keeper. They get a double. That got big on the batter and he was a little late on it but landed safe

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, fuller length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones gets drawn into a drive and mi
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, fuller length delivery, outside off, Michael Jones gets drawn into a drive and misses. I0$

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, finally a change in length after the slip came out. Little fuller, outside off, l
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, no run, finally a change in length after the slip came out. Little fuller, outside off, left alone. Was closer to the sticks as well

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, , and four more. Decent start for Scotland. Got the bat down on that back of a length del
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, , and four more. Decent start for Scotland. Got the bat down on that back of a length delivery and punched it wide of point for a four. This length not helping Archer

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, punches it by standing tall and getting it wide of the man at cover to his right
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, punches it by standing tall and getting it wide of the man at cover to his right this time and they get another brace

short_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, back of a length delivery, Michael Jones punches it and a misfield by the man at
full_text: Jofra Archer to Michael Jones, 2 runs, back of a length delivery, Michael Jones punches it and a misfield by the man at cover allows two runs. The fielder dived a little too early

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, dot ball to end the over. On a length, angled across, Munsey opens the bat's face and finds
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, dot ball to end the over. On a length, angled across, Munsey opens the bat's face and finds point

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, short ball, quicker, Munsey mistimes the pull down to mid-wicket. That was bowled short at
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, short ball, quicker, Munsey mistimes the pull down to mid-wicket. That was bowled short at 92.7 mph

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , first four of the game and heaved over mid-on. Was a delivery at 94 miles per hour and was in the
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, , first four of the game and heaved over mid-on. Was a delivery at 94 miles per hour and was in the slot outside off. Munsey managed to get hold of the delivery and slammed it across the line and over mid-on

short_text: Mark Wood to Michael Jones, 1 run, and manages to send it wide of mid-on for a single. Full and swinging again from Wood
full_text: Mark Wood to Michael Jones, 1 run, and manages to send it wide of mid-on for a single. Full and swinging again from Wood at almost 150 clicks. Michael Jones got it down to mid-on for a single

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, leg byes, 1 run, Wood tumbles down. On the pads, angles in, Munsey misses the clip and the ball rol
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, leg byes, 1 run, Wood tumbles down. On the pads, angles in, Munsey misses the clip and the ball rolls off the pads to short fine for a single

short_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, and that's on the mark from Mark Wood straightaway. Nails the yorker at 145.1 clicks. Munse
full_text: Mark Wood to Munsey, no run, and that's on the mark from Mark Wood straightaway. Nails the yorker at 145.1 clicks. Munsey gets the bat down in time and somehow manages to dig it out
